tasks.description: Add content status configuration to _config.yml with status badges for draft, in-progress, complete, and review states
tasks.acceptance: _config.yml contains callout definitions for status badges and status field is documented

tasks.description: Create reusable status badge include at _includes/status-badge.html that renders based on page.status frontmatter
tasks.acceptance: Include file accepts status parameter and renders appropriate badge with correct styling

tasks.description: Add status badges to all existing content pages in Physics/A-Level-Phys section by updating frontmatter
tasks.acceptance: All 15+ Physics A-Level pages have status field set to appropriate value (complete, in-progress, or draft)

tasks.description: Add status badges to all existing content pages in Physics/IFY-Phys and Physics/IGCSE-Phys sections
tasks.acceptance: All IFY-Phys and IGCSE-Phys index pages have status field set appropriately

tasks.description: Add status badges to all existing content pages in Mathematics/A-Level-Maths section
tasks.acceptance: All 6 Mathematics module index pages have status field set appropriately

tasks.description: Create custom navigation styling in _sass/custom/navigation.scss to improve visual hierarchy with indentation and icons
tasks.acceptance: SCSS file compiles without errors and navigation shows improved visual hierarchy in browser

tasks.description: Add breadcrumb navigation include at _includes/breadcrumbs.html and add to default layout
tasks.acceptance: Breadcrumbs display on all pages showing Home → Subject → Level → Topic path

tasks.description: Create related topics include at _includes/related-topics.html that displays linked pages based on tags
tasks.acceptance: Include accepts tags parameter and renders related pages section with working links

tasks.description: Add related topics section to complete Physics A-Level content pages by updating frontmatter with tags
tasks.acceptance: All complete Physics A-Level pages have tags frontmatter and related-topics include

tasks.description: Create prerequisites callout include at _includes/prerequisites.html for displaying required prior knowledge
tasks.acceptance: Include file renders prerequisite callout with linked concepts when prerequisites frontmatter is set

tasks.description: Add prerequisites callout to complex Physics topics that depend on prior knowledge
tasks.acceptance: At least 5 complex topics have prerequisites frontmatter set and callout displays correctly

tasks.description: Create progress indicator include for index pages showing completion percentage based on child page statuses
tasks.acceptance: Include calculates percentage from child pages and displays visual progress bar

tasks.description: Redesign homepage with Quick Links section featuring direct access to popular topics and formulas
tasks.acceptance: Homepage displays Quick Links grid with at least 6 common entry points and works on mobile

tasks.description: Add responsive CSS rules for MathJax equations to prevent overflow on mobile devices
tasks.acceptance: Mathematical equations scale appropriately and do not cause horizontal scroll on 375px viewport

tasks.description: Create custom CSS file _sass/custom/mobile-fixes.scss for mobile-specific navigation and layout improvements
tasks.acceptance: CSS file compiles and navigation is usable on mobile devices with collapsed sidebar

tasks.description: Document content patterns in AGENTS.md or new docs/ folder for consistent frontmatter usage
tasks.acceptance: Documentation file explains status field values, tags usage, and prerequisites format with examples

tasks.description: Run Jekyll build verification to ensure all changes compile without errors
tasks.acceptance: Build completes successfully with no warnings or errors in console output
